name: agentipy-mcp-server
description: The Agentipy MCP Server is an open-source Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables Claude AI to interact with the Solana blockchain. It provides a standardized interface for AI agents to perform various blockchain operations, including transactions, wallet management, and data queries.
